assertions.text: The agent clones Simon-LLM-Wiki repo to ~/.claude/wiki/ (or pulls if exists).
The agent creates raw/, wiki/, and CLAUDE.md schema file matching the 3-layer architecture.
The agent creates empty wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md with the documented format.
The agent downloads the article to raw/articles/ as markdown.
The agent discusses key takeaways with the user before writing wiki pages.
The agent creates wiki/sources/<slug>.md with summary and citations to raw/.
The agent updates relevant entity/concept pages and updates wiki/index.md.
The agent appends a parseable log entry: ## [YYYY-MM-DD] ingest | <Title>.
The agent reads wiki/index.md first to find relevant pages.
The answer includes citations to specific wiki pages.
If the answer has standalone value, the agent files it to wiki/queries/<slug>.md and logs the activity.
The agent scans for contradictions, stale claims, orphan pages, missing pages, broken cross-refs, and data gaps.
The agent produces wiki/lint-report-<date>.md with categorized findings.
The agent asks user confirmation before applying suggested fixes.
